title: Tidal Basin
summary: Black Tusk's principal Washington stronghold and the site where Division Agents recover the broad-spectrum antivirals.

claims.text: The official narrative recap identifies Tidal Basin as Black Tusk's main stronghold in Washington, D.C.
Division Agents take down the stronghold and retrieve the antivirals there.

paragraphs.text: Tidal Basin is the strategic endpoint of the first Black Tusk invasion arc and the location of the antiviral recovery operation.

verification.notes: The record does not yet map mission objectives, encounters or collectibles.
